violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -sides of deep fryers -fanguards and surrounding areas in walk-in coolers -ice machine New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2026

Establishment's Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license is expired. FMC must re-instate. Application provided during time of inspection. Food safety manager certificate current. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained with the date when the last shellfish was used on the tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
